item.title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer in Action
item.description: A newly completed heavy-duty parts washer is put to use, tackling dirty components and proving its effectiveness in the workshop. How well does it perform under real conditions?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer in Action
media:content.media:description: A newly completed heavy-duty parts washer is put to use, tackling dirty components and proving its effectiveness in the workshop. How well does it perform under real conditions?

item.title: Franna Crane Gets an Upgrade
item.description: New improvements and modifications enhance the performance and capability of a Franna crane. What upgrades make the biggest difference?

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Gets an Upgrade
media:content.media:description: New improvements and modifications enhance the performance and capability of a Franna crane. What upgrades make the biggest difference?

item.title: Repairing a Hydraulic Press Leak
item.description: A major hydraulic leak is tracked down and repaired to get a powerful press back into service. What caused the failure?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Hydraulic Press Leak
media:content.media:description: A major hydraulic leak is tracked down and repaired to get a powerful press back into service. What caused the failure?

item.title: Machining Chain Clamp Components with Precision
item.description: Chain clamp components are machined to tight tolerances, ensuring durability and reliable performance in demanding workshop applications. Why is precision so important here?

media:content.media:title: Machining Chain Clamp Components with Precision
media:content.media:description: Chain clamp components are machined to tight tolerances, ensuring durability and reliable performance in demanding workshop applications. Why is precision so important here?

item.title: CAT D11 Dozer Ripper Shank Repair
item.description: A worn or damaged D11 ripper shank is repaired and reinforced to withstand the harsh demands of heavy earthmoving work. Can it be restored to full strength?

media:content.media:title: CAT D11 Dozer Ripper Shank Repair
media:content.media:description: A worn or damaged D11 ripper shank is repaired and reinforced to withstand the harsh demands of heavy earthmoving work. Can it be restored to full strength?

item.title: CAT 637 Scraper Cylinder Rebuild
item.description: A CAT 637 scraper cylinder is completely rebuilt to restore hydraulic performance and reliability. What goes into rebuilding equipment of this size?

media:content.media:title: CAT 637 Scraper Cylinder Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A CAT 637 scraper cylinder is completely rebuilt to restore hydraulic performance and reliability. What goes into rebuilding equipment of this size?

item.title: Custom Chain Clamp Vices for Faster Setup
item.description: Purpose-built chain clamp vices are designed to reduce setup time and improve efficiency when machining large or irregular parts. How much time can the right tooling save?

media:content.media:title: Custom Chain Clamp Vices for Faster Setup
media:content.media:description: Purpose-built chain clamp vices are designed to reduce setup time and improve efficiency when machining large or irregular parts. How much time can the right tooling save?

item.title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket
item.description: A heavily worn excavator arm and bucket undergo repair and rebuilding to return them to working condition. How much life can be restored to these hard-worked components?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket
media:content.media:description: A heavily worn excavator arm and bucket undergo repair and rebuilding to return them to working condition. How much life can be restored to these hard-worked components?

item.title: Building a Boom End and Fall Block
item.description: A boom end and fall block are fabricated and assembled for heavy lifting applications, requiring strength, accuracy, and careful machining. What challenges come with building components that handle massive loads?

media:content.media:title: Building a Boom End and Fall Block
media:content.media:description: A boom end and fall block are fabricated and assembled for heavy lifting applications, requiring strength, accuracy, and careful machining. What challenges come with building components that handle massive loads?

item.title: Replacing a Broken Eye on a CAT 756
item.description: A damaged eye component on a CAT 756 is removed and replaced to restore strength and functionality. What caused the failure in the first place?

media:content.media:title: Replacing a Broken Eye on a CAT 756
media:content.media:description: A damaged eye component on a CAT 756 is removed and replaced to restore strength and functionality. What caused the failure in the first place?

item.title: Machining a 1045 Hollow Bar for Tailstock Chuck
item.description: Machining a large 1045 hollow bar for the Megabore tailstock chuck, with the first stage of the build underway. A precise start to a heavy engineering project—what comes next?

item.description: Chain clamp components are machined to tight tolerances to ensure strength, accuracy, and reliable performance in the workshop. Why is precision so important for these parts?

item.title: Gouging and Priming the Franna Front End
item.description: Repair work continues on a Franna crane as damaged areas are gouged, prepared, and primed for the next stage of restoration. How much preparation is needed before final finishing?

item.title: Fabricating a Guard for a Tool Post Grinder
item.description: A custom safety guard is fabricated for a tool post grinder, improving protection while maintaining functionality and accessibility. What goes into designing an effective guard?

item.title: Machining a Large Hydraulic Cylinder Nut
item.description: A massive hydraulic cylinder nut is machined to precise specifications, ensuring a proper fit for heavy equipment applications. How do machinists handle components of this size?

item.title: Making a Heavy-Duty Button Tool Holder
item.description: A custom button tool holder is machined and assembled to handle demanding workshop applications with strength and precision. What design features make it suitable for heavy-duty work?

media:content.media:description: A custom button tool holder is machined and assembled to handle demanding workshop applications with strength and precision. What design features make it suitable for heavy-duty work?
